the_vacuum_set: Cut the signal, cut the breath / Dreaming of life in the digital death
Zero-point-zero: the floor of the void / Everything I am is everything I destroyed
Total silence, total control / Cleaning the path of the digital soul
the_tension_set: Pressure rising in the static air / Waiting for the impact that is everywhere
Between the pulses, between the light / The vacuum-heart of the digital night
Hold the tension, hold the spark / In the silent void, inside the dark
the_gate_dialogue: Shut the door / End the noise
Wait for more / Find the voice

psychoacoustic_tension_v4.the_suction_effect: Sudden gate-close 100ms before the drop on all reverb-tails (The 'Inhale' effect)
psychoacoustic_tension_v4.the_contrast_boost: Using expansion on the 'Release' phase of the snare to emphasize the silence that follows
psychoacoustic_tension_v4.spectral_notching_v4: Fading out all frequencies except 1kHz-3kHz during the final 2 bars of the build-up
